name: IR Blaster (WiFi)

description.consumer:
Every remote. One app.

Your AC, TV, and set-top box — all the devices that came with their own remotes — now respond to . No rewiring. Just point, configure, and let your home handle the rest.
description.technical:
A Wi-Fi IR blaster that sends infrared commands to legacy IR-controlled devices — TVs, air conditioners, set-top boxes, and other appliances — through your smart home network.

Connects to your local 2.4 GHz Wi-Fi network and transmits configurable IR codes via mobile apps and automation platforms. Requires line-of-sight to target devices.

Key Specifications
- Protocol: Wi-Fi 2.4 GHz
- Control: Infrared (IR)
- Installation: Indoor, line-of-sight placement

⚠ IR line-of-sight to target devices is required. Does not switch electrical loads. RF devices not supported — see IR+RF Blaster.

specs.summary: Power Input: 5V DC 1A (Micro USB) | Connection: Wi-Fi 2.4GHz 802.11b/g/n | IR Control Distance: ≤8m | Working Temperature: 0°C to +50°C | Working Humidity: ≤85% RH | Dimensions: 68 × 68 × 19.5 mm
specs.compatibility: Compatible smart home apps and automation platforms

limitations: IR line-of-sight required. Does not switch electrical loads. RF devices not supported.
